name: mneme
description: A tiny, dependency-free memory layer for LLM agents — self-editing core blocks + an append-only archive, with pluggable smart recall.

scripts.test: node lib/mneme.cjs health >/dev/null && node examples/demo.cjs >/dev/null && echo ok
scripts.check: node --check lib/mneme.cjs && node --check examples/demo.cjs && node --check examples/reranker-echo.cjs && echo ok
